name: Royal Oak
description: Identify the Royal Oak by its octagonal bezel secured with eight exposed hexagonal screws, the 'Tapisserie' waffle-textured dial, and the integrated tapering bracelet. It may come in variants like: blue 'Petite Tapisserie' dial, grey, black, and openworked skeleton dials.

name: Royal Oak Offshore
description: Identify the Royal Oak Offshore as a bigger, bolder Royal Oak: a thicker case, an oversized screwed octagonal bezel, a 'Méga Tapisserie' dial, chunky chronograph pushers, and often a rubber strap. It may come in variants like: black, blue, and camouflage editions.

name: Code 11.59
description: Identify the Code 11.59 by its round bezel set within a clearly visible octagonal middle case, a double-curved sapphire crystal, and a stick-style applied logo. It may come in variants like: blue lacquer dial, black, white, and smoked editions.
